Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Action To Proper Venue
Off Calendar Oct-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT GARY LOONEY'S Motion To Transfer Action To Proper Venue is DENIED. While the first amended complaint is not entirely clear whether Mr. Looney is sued on any grounds other than being the alleged alter ego of CTA, plaintiff's ex parte application seeking leave to file the first amended complaint make clear that alter ego is the only basis for seeking to impose liability on Mr. Looney and plaintiff would be judicially estopped from asserting otherwise. Since the only basis for asserting liability against Mr. Looney is the alter ego doctrine, Mr. Looney is not entitled to have this case transferred to Sonoma County. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)
